prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-POCKETKN-PARENT Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Styled Inlay Pocket Knife Steel Blade Description: Be prepared for any situation with the ASR Outdoor Drop Point Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife features a thumb assist drop point blade constructed of durable steel. The handle has a comfortable ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and the handle has a cool black wood inlay. The knife unfolds to an overall length of 8", the blade itself is 3.5" and it folds to a compact 4.5".

The knife also has a metal pocket clip that allows you to easily secure the blade when not in use. This is a great every day carry tool or gift idea for knife collectors and outdoor enthusiasts. Search Terms: hunting knives every day carry multi tool steel blades fire starters camping survival emergency preparedness Features: - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - CR13 Steel Wont Rust | Cool Inlay Design - DROP POINT BLADE - DROP POINT BLADE - Convex Spine for Easily Controlled Point & Big Belly for Slicing | Great Blade for Hunters - POCKET CLIP - Sturdy Clip Attached for Easy Storage When Not In Use | Keeps Blade Secured - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Comfortable Grip Prevents Slippage During Use - COMPACT DESIGN- 8" Overall Length, 3.5" Blade, 4.5" Folded | Fits Easily Inside Pocket, Bag or Backpack === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
